headline: Apple Car Project Loses Another Key Executive: Analyst Says 2022 'Make-Or-Break' Year For EV Ambitions
summary: Apple, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: AAPL) self-driving car project, named "Project Titan" has been a non-starter due to multiple issues. The team has seen a mass exodus of executive talent, apparently reflecting uneasiness over the long overdue nature of the plan.

headline: Nio's New ET5 Sedan Will Be Available In Norway And Other Markets By Spring 2023: Report
'Spider-Man: No Way Home' Silences 'Scream' To Retake Top Spot At Box Office
summary: One week after losing the berth as the nation’s top grossing weekend box office hit to “Scream,” “Spider-Man: No Way Home” took back the leadership role as the most popular film among American moviegoers.

headline: Top WallStreetBets Mentions for Sunday January 23, 2022: GME, TSLA, AAPL, MSFT, AMC, NFLX, PLTR, HOOD, NVDA, SOFI
Apple Supplier Foxconn Sees 2022 As 'Challenging' While Bringing 'Opportunities Not Seen In Decades'
summary: Apple, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: AAPL) contract manufacturer Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd. (PNK: HNHPF) issued positive commentary on demand outlook, which has hopeful implications for many U.S. tech companies.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech (Jan 23-29): Roche, Azurity FDA Decisions, J&J, Vertex Earnings, Samsara Vision IPO And More
summary: Biotech stocks pulled back yet again during the week ending Jan. 21, with the sector retreating along with the broader market. The news flow tapered off following the frenetic pace of the week that encompassed the JPM Healthcare conference.

headline: Here's Why Tony Zhang Thinks Microsoft's Stock Is Primed For A Recovery
summary: Shares of Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT) declined by 1.85% to close trading Friday at $296.03 amid a broader tech selloff.

headline: Bloomberg's Mark Gurman Reported Apple to Announce Four New iPhones, New MacBook Pro, Update iMac, New iMac Pro, More in Fall 2022
Apple's Lead Engineering Program Manager, Autonomous Systems, Joe Bass, has Left to Become Director of Technical Program Management, Mixed Reality Technologies, According to his LinkedIn Page
A Tale Of Two Chip Stocks: Intel, Texas Instruments Get The Ball Rolling For Semiconductor Earnings
summary: Intel Corporation (NASDAQ: INTC) and Texas Instruments Incorporated (NASDAQ: TXN) report quarterly results this week, marking the beginning of the big tech earnings season.

headline: What Does It Feel Like To Lose $25B In One Week? Ask Elon Musk
summary: While investors in both traditional and the crypto markets are feeling some pain at the start of 2022, the biggest loser so far has been the world’s richest man Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TESLA) CEO Elon Musk, who’s net worth dropped by 9% last week, a whopping $25.1 billion.
